name: Swiss Vegatble Casserole
recipeIngredient: 6 pieces Green onions, cut into 1/2 inch pieces (1/2 cup)
1 pound Frozen mixed broccoli, carrots, and cauliflower, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 1 to 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
2. In a medium saucepan, melt margarine over medium heat. Add onions and cook, stirring occasionally, for 2 to 3 minutes or until tender.
3. Stir in flour, salt, and pepper; mix well. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly. Cook and stir until the mixture is bubbly and thickened. Remove from heat.
4. Stir in 3/4 cup of the cheese until melted. Add cooked vegetables and stir. Pour the mixture into the greased casserole dish. Sprinkle with crushed crackers and remaining 1/4 cup cheese.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the casserole is bubbly.
